blockers_discovered.description: ffmpeg not on PATH. Verified via `ffmpeg -version` in bash (command not found), PowerShell (CommandNotFoundException), and direct probes of common Windows install locations (C:\ffmpeg\bin, C:\Program Files\ffmpeg\bin, C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin, C:\tools\ffmpeg\bin, scoop apps + shims, WinGet Links) — none exist. Per spec Step 2 we do NOT attempt alternative encoders this cycle. Action required: install ffmpeg with libvorbis (preferred) or libmp3lame, ensure it's on PATH, then re-dispatch this agent.

BLOCKED. audio-asset-cleanup must NOT be re-dispatched until this agent completes a successful pass. The 5 zero-byte .ogg placeholders remain in place; archiving the .wav masters now would re-trigger the silent-audio incident from 2026-04-26T01:35Z.
